code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut total = 0
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
  mut i = 0
  while i < lines.len()
    let line = match lines.get(i)
    when Some(l) l
    when None ""
    end
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
      if parts.len() >= 2
        let second = match parts.get(1)
        when Some(s) s
        when None ""
        end
        let n = match string.parse_int(second)
        when Some(v) v
        when None 0
        end
        total = total + n
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("sum=#{total}")
  Ok(())
end
